name: Message
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Message composition over local Attachment, Avatar, Bubble, Button, Marker, and cn helpers with grouped rows, avatar placement, metadata, actions, attachments, and static markdown-style examples.

registry.reason: Message attachment examples compose the local shadcn Attachment item.
Message avatar examples compose the local shadcn Avatar item.
Message body examples compose the local shadcn Bubble item.
Message footer actions compose the local shadcn Button item.
Message demo composes the local shadcn Marker item for typing status.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for the message alignment, role, and avatar placement contracts.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: The installable source uses static markdown-style markup instead of a markdown runtime.
Origin icon usage is replaced by local inline SVGs in the installable examples.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: MessageDemo
examples.description: Basic conversation with avatars, bubbles, grouped replies, footer metadata, and a typing marker.
examples.distinguishes: Basic conversation with avatars, bubbles, grouped replies, footer metadata, and a typing marker.

examples.title: MessageGroupDemo
examples.description: Grouped consecutive messages from the same sender.
examples.distinguishes: Grouped consecutive messages from the same sender.

examples.title: MessageAvatarDemo
examples.description: Messages with sender avatars and grouped assistant responses.
examples.distinguishes: Messages with sender avatars and grouped assistant responses.

examples.title: MessageHeaderFooterDemo
examples.description: Header and footer metadata around message bubbles.
examples.distinguishes: Header and footer metadata around message bubbles.

examples.title: MessageActionsDemo
examples.description: Footer action buttons for copy, feedback, and retry controls.
examples.distinguishes: Footer action buttons for copy, feedback, and retry controls.

examples.title: MessageAttachmentDemo
examples.description: Message composition with image and document attachments.
examples.distinguishes: Message composition with image and document attachments.

examples.title: MessageMarkdownDemo
examples.description: Static markdown-style assistant response inside a ghost bubble.
examples.distinguishes: Static markdown-style assistant response inside a ghost bubble.

deviations.summary: Message examples use local inline SVG icons and static markdown-style markup.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source cannot use lucide-react or the origin Markdown runtime. The local examples preserve the message surfaces with pure Foldkit Html, local primitives, inline SVGs, and static markdown-style content.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Message composition over local Attachment, Avatar, Bubble, Button, Marker, and cn helpers with grouped rows, avatar placement, metadata, actions, attachments, and static markdown-style examples.
